n: Book 10, Chapter 9: A Song for Byre Tor

steps.t: The City of Byre Tor is in the High Knolls of Wildermore, located north of Dunfast along the road. Horn desires to see the city of Byre Tor for himsel…
Nona's cave is in the north-western heights of the rocky crags in the High Knolls, in Wildermore. Gléowine has finished his song, and Horn is satisfie…
If this is the cave of which Nona spoke, she will likely be somewhere inside.
The survivors Nona rescued from Byre Tor can be found throughout the two chambers of her cave.
Nona is in her cave in the High Knolls.
